text:
In the first scene, observing a room full of people engaged in collaborative activity behind glass, I feel a sense of separation yet curiosity—an outsider looking in at the unfolding interactions and the shared pursuit of knowledge or solutions. The clean, modern architecture instills an air of professionalism and order.

In the second scene, the vibrant colors and bold 'R+D' on the wall stimulate my mind—here, the spirit of research and development pulses tangibly. Surrounded by information displays and technological artifacts, I feel inspired. The environment beckons inquiry, innovation, and the joy of discovery. I am reminded of the ever-present quest to understand and shape the world.
